data.current_description: Creates a new paste item with the given content. Authenticating makes you the owner of the item.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new paste item with the provided content. Supports optional parameters for syntax highlighting, expiry time, and privacy settings. Authentication is optional; authenticated requests associate the item with your user account as the owner. Returns the created item with its unique identifier and URL. Unauthenticated items are temporary and may be subject to automatic cleanup policies.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical input details (syntax, expiry, privacy options), output details (what is returned), and side effects (ownership implications, temporary nature of unauthenticated items). These details are essential for AI agents to determine appropriate usage and understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'deleteItem' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is incomplete for AI agent usage. Missing details about the itemId parameter requirement, what constitutes successful deletion (response format), and critical side effects (permanent deletion, immediate inaccessibility). These details help agents understand authorization requirements and irreversible consequences.

data.current_description: Deletes an existing paste item. You must authenticate as the poster of the item.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing paste item by its identifier. Requires authentication and authorization - only the item's original poster can delete it. Returns a success confirmation. Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. The item becomes immediately inaccessible to all users.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete for AI agent usage. Missing details about the itemId parameter requirement, what constitutes successful deletion (response format), and critical side effects (permanent deletion, immediate inaccessibility). These details help agents understand authorization requirements and irreversible consequences.

message: Operation 'getUserItems' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity on output format details (array structure, URL format) and context about visibility rules. The distinction between anonymous and authenticated access is mentioned but could be clearer about what 'public items only' means and whether authenticated users see their own private items. data.current_summary: Get links to a user's items
data.current_description: Returns a JSON array of item URLs for the specified user. Anonymous requests return public items only.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of paste item URLs for the specified user. Returns a JSON array of item URLs. Anonymous requests return only publicly visible items; authenticated requests may return additional private items if authorized. Useful for discovering a user's paste history or portfolio.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on output format details (array structure, URL format) and context about visibility rules. The distinction between anonymous and authenticated access is mentioned but could be clearer about what 'public items only' means and whether authenticated users see their own private items. Added context about use cases for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get details of a user's items
data.current_description: Returns detailed information about all items for a user. Anonymous requests return public items only.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about all paste items for the specified user. Anonymous requests return only publicly visible items; authenticated requests may return additional private items if authorized. Useful for bulk retrieval of a user's paste portfolio.
